name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, unplanned equipment maintenance causes project delays. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Equipment downtime due to unplanned maintenance
